description: Wire the storage backend selection into CLI startup and daemon initialization. Add --storage flag (json-file | sqlite | postgres) and AO_STORAGE_BACKEND env var. Add database connection config to .ao/config.json. Default remains json-file for backward compatibility. Add `ao storage migrate` command to run schema migrations. Add `ao storage export/import` for converting between backends (dump JSON files to DB and vice versa). Update ServiceHub construction to accept any StorageBackend.
title: Add storage backend selection and configuration to CLI and daemon
